Two sets of detector systems were positioned at
+-55 deg to the beam axis. Each system consisted of a
model GR10024 encased in cosmic-ray anticoincidence
Because of the target radioactivity, 26 mm of lead
shielding was placed between the target and detector
system to reduce the event rate in the detectors to a
